twitter_thread: 73,000 Blox Fruits players use auto farm scripts daily, but 88% don't adjust their settings to avoid bans.
Combining auto farm with ESP scripts like those in the Dragon Update can boost progress by 35%.
Raid scripts can earn 250,000 gold per hour, but 1 in 5 users get suspended due to detection.
The Elite auto farm script costs 500 Robux, but offers a 90% reduction in ban risk.
Trainers with anti-ban measures can reduce suspension risk by 40%, but require weekly updates.
Staying ahead requires updating scripts every 2 weeks to match game patches like the Dragon Update.
What's your experience with auto farm scripts in Blox Fruits? Do you think they're worth the risk? #bloxfruits #gaming
